visuals.title: Cloud Service Models Comparison
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Cloud Service Models Comparison
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">System Models for Cloud Computing</text>
  
  <!-- Cloud Infrastructure -->
  <rect x="110" y="280" width="200" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cloud Infrastructure
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- IaaS -->
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    IaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- PaaS -->
  <rect x="160" y="200" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- SaaS -->
  <rect x="260" y="200" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    SaaS
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Infrastructure to Service Models -->
  <line x1="210" y1="280" x2="110" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="280" x2="210" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="280" x2="310" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Deployment Models -->
  <rect x="60" y="120" width="300" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Deployment Models
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Service Models to Deployment -->
  <line x1="110" y1="200" x2="110" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="200" x2="210" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="310" y1="200" x2="310" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Public Cloud -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Public
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Private Cloud -->
  <rect x="150" y="60" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="190" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Private
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Hybrid Cloud -->
  <rect x="240" y="60" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Hybrid
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Deployment Models to Cloud Types -->
  <line x1="110" y1="120" x2="100" y2="60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="120" x2="190" y2="60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="310" y1="120" x2="280" y2="60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
